title: Skills
subtitle: My Skills
description: Below, you’ll find an overview of my technical proficiencies and interpersonal strengths, which together make me a versatile and reliable developer.

technicalSkill.title: Technical Skills
technicalSkill.description: Proficient in a wide range of web development technologies and tools, including HTML, CSS, JavaScript, TypeScript, PHP, Java, C#, C, Python. Experienced with frameworks and libraries such as React, Laravel, Bootstrap, and Tailwind CSS, as well as tools and technologies like relational databases, GitHub, and Figma. Skilled in version control, responsive design, API integration, CRUD operations, database management, and problem-solving.

softSkill.title: Soft Skills
softSkill.description: A strong collaborator with excellent Communication skills, capable of managing projects effectively through Time Management and meticulous Attention to Detail. Recognized for my ability to work well in teams and adapt to new challenges in fast-paced environments.
